mapper.insert: INSERT INTO student_tutor_relation (student_id, tutor_id, status, apply_time, apply_note, attach_file) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{tutorId}, #{status}, #{applyTime}, #{applyNote}, #{attachFile})
mapper.select: SELECT * FROM student_tutor_relation WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND tutor_id = #{tutorId}
SELECT * FROM student_tutor_relation WHERE tutor_id = #{tutorId} AND status = #{status}
SELECT * FROM student_tutor_relation WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND status = #{status}

SELECT r.id AS id, r.student_id AS studentId, r.tutor_id AS tutorId, r.status AS status, r.apply_time AS applyTime, r.apply_note AS applyNote, r.attach_file AS attachFile, u.real_name AS studentName, u.avatar AS avatar, s.student_no AS studentNo, s.college AS college, s.major AS major, s.class_name AS className, s.enrollment_year AS enrollmentYear, s.resume_file AS resumeFile FROM student_tutor_relation r LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON u.user_id = r.student_id LEFT JOIN info_student s ON s.user_id = r.student_id WHERE r.tutor_id = #{tutorId} AND r.status = 0 ORDER BY r.apply_time DESC
SELECT student_id FROM student_tutor_relation WHERE tutor_id = #{tutorId} AND status = 1 ORDER BY apply_time DESC
